'''''SHADIS Magazine'' 14''' was a roleplaying magazine from July/August of [[1994]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Strange Bedfellows]]," and was written by [[John Zinser]].
